title: CLOTHING VOUCHERS - 211info
text: CLATSOP COMMUNITY ACTION CLOTHING VOUCHERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Clothing vouchers supplied to individuals and families in neede every 90 days 364 9th Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Low income households Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-3:30pm Email (503) 325-1400 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 325-1400 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clatsop County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-3:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the corner of 9th and Duane Streets, two blocks south of the transit center Services: Clothing Vouchers Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - MOBILE PRODUCE PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - COORDINATED ENTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - HILLTOP FAMILY HOUSING HOUSING/SHELTER - RENTAL ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - VETERAN HOUSING ASSISTANCE INFORMATION SERVICES - INFORMATION AND REFERRAL MATERIAL GOODS - PERSONAL CARE PANTRY MATERIAL GOODS - SHOWER CART UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
